UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the system.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

avatar.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a single document in the workflow system.

name.description: The name of the document file.

type.description: The AI-detected type of the document (e.g., Invoice, Contract).

status.description: The current overall status of the document.

uploaderId.description: The UID of the user who uploaded the document.

uploaderName.description: The name of the user who uploaded the document.

metadata.description: Key-value pairs of metadata extracted from the document.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the document was last updated.

WorkflowStep.title: Workflow Step
WorkflowStep.description: A single step in a document's approval workflow.

AuditTrailEntry.title: Audit Trail Entry
AuditTrailEntry.description: An entry in the document's audit log.

user.description: The name of the user who performed the action.

comment.description: An optional comment associated with the action.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profiles for all users.

/documents/{documentId}/workflow.description: Sub-collection for the approval workflow steps of a document.

/documents/{documentId}/auditTrail.description: Sub-collection for the audit trail of a document.
